theme_and_archetype.description: A trust-inspiring, reliable, and solid aesthetic. Focus on craftsmanship, Skåne locale, and professional construction work. Avoid SaaS floaty designs. Use grounded, matte, and physical visual cues.

headings.styling: tracking-tight for headings above text-2xl. Use font-bold for authoritative statements.

hierarchy.overline: uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold text-amber-700

background.description: Warm sand and stone grey for the matte, physical feel.

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing philosophy (p-12, p-16, p-24, py-32). Use strict geometric alignments mimicking architectural drafting.

grid_modes.marketing_bento: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Hero images span large columns, text overlaps.
grid_modes.gallery_tetris: Asymmetric bento grids for the gallery section. Mix square, tall, and wide spans to create visual tension and avoid boring equal squares.

layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges (rounded-none) or very subtle (rounded-sm). Avoid large corner radii. Emphasize straight architectural lines.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid background (bg-stone-50/95) with backdrop-blur-md and a crisp bottom border (border-stone-200).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.footer: Massive space (py-24). High contrast: bg-stone-900 with text-stone-300.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy shadows. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay over images to maintain text contrast (bg-gradient-to-r from-stone-900/80 to-stone-900/30). Max overall opacity 40-50%.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-700 text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-amber-800 transition-colors inline-flex items-center
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-stone-900 text-stone-900 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-stone-900 hover:text-white transition-colors

components.forms: Use Shadcn customized components. Inputs should have square corners (rounded-none), bg-white, border-stone-300, focus:border-amber-700 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-700.
components.gallery_lightbox: Clicking an image expands it using a lightweight modal/lightbox. Use a framer-motion AnimatePresence overlay.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for high-end professional feel.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must change state clearly. Text links get an underline expansion, cards lift.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for gallery items and service cards.

hero.description: Main hero banner displaying construction work

about.description: About section showcasing the team or company vehicle

contact.description: Background image for the contact form section

textures.description: Subtle background texture for solid sections
Subtle background texture for warmer sections

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a multi-page marketing site using React Router. Pages required: Home, Services (with detail views), Gallery, About, Contact, Admin View.
ALL UI TEXT MUST BE IN SWEDISH.
Hero Section: Use tagline 'Din lokala byggpartner'. Implement heavy overlap of typography on the hero background image. Use bg-black/40 overlay on the hero image to ensure text readability.
Gallery: Implement a robust filterable gallery component. Categories: Alla, Renovering, Målning, Takläggning, Rivning, Referensprojekt. Implement a lightbox feature for clicked images.
Contact & Admin: Build an 'Offertförfrågan' form that saves to a database. Build a simple Admin view route to list received requests.
Trust Signals: Dedicate a section displaying partners 'PEAB' and 'VEIDEKKE'. Use bold, uppercase typography for these logos instead of placeholders. Also feature years in business (since 2017).
Forms: Do not use native inputs. Install and use Shadcn Form, Input, and Textarea. Customize their appearance to match the architectural theme (sharp corners, earthy focus rings).
Testing: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Work Sans' for body text.
